# My Dotfile Config

- Setup using this link: https://harfangk.github.io/2016/09/18/manage-dotfiles-with-a-git-bare-repository.html

## Programs used
- `zsh` as my shell and [prezto](https://github.com/sorin-ionescu/prezto) as an addon to zsh
- `nvim` as my text editor, but config is split between `.vimrc` and `~/.config/nvim/init.vim`
- [yabai](https://github.com/koekeishiya/yabai) and [skhd](https://github.com/koekeishiya/skhd) to manage Mac Windows
- `iterm2` as my default terminal 
  - This link helps setup the terminal: http://stratus3d.com/blog/2015/02/28/sync-iterm2-profile-with-dotfiles-repository/
- [vifm](https://vifm.info/) file manger (do i really use this tho? lol)

## Other programs
- [Spicetify](https://github.com/khanhas/spicetify-cli): love the themeable spotify
  - I use the Dribblish Nord theme
  - Really useful to set `display: none !important` on any ads
